tasks.title: Define ProjectType Enum
tasks.description: Define enum with 11 variants: Node, Rust, Python, Go, Java, Cpp, Ruby, Php, Dotnet, Swift, Unknown. Add derives: Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize. Add serde rename_all = "lowercase"
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ProjectType enum has exactly 11 variants
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectType::Rust serialization to lowercase string
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectType::Unknown deserialization from "unknown"
AddRegressionTest: ensure all derives (Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize) work correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Use thiserror-free enum. Ensure serde rename_all = "lowercase" is applied correctly.

tasks.title: Define PackageManager Enum
tasks.description: Define enum with 11 variants: Npm, Yarn, Pnpm, Bun, Cargo, Pip, Poetry, Go, Maven, Gradle, Unknown. Add derives: Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize. Add serde rename_all = "lowercase"
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify PackageManager enum has exactly 11 variants
AddUnitTest: verify PackageManager::Pnpm serialization to "pnpm"
AddUnitTest: verify PackageManager::Cargo deserialization from "cargo"
tasks.impl_notes: Ensure serde rename_all = "lowercase" is applied correctly.

tasks.title: Define ProjectError Enum
tasks.description: Define enum with 4 variants: NotFound, ReadError, ParseError, Ambiguous. Add thiserror #[derive(Error)]. Implement proper error messages with #[error()] attributes.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ProjectError::NotFound displays as 'not found'
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectError::ReadError with context displays correctly
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectError::ParseError displays with parsing context
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify ProjectError implements std::error::Error trait
tasks.impl_notes: Use thiserror for Error derive. Add context fields where appropriate.

tasks.title: Define ProjectConfig Struct
tasks.description: Define struct with 4 fields: package_json (Option<serde_json::Value>), cargo_toml (Option<String>), start_command (Option<String>), install_command (Option<String>). Add derives: Debug, Clone, Default, Serialize, Deserialize.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ProjectConfig::default() returns all None fields
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectConfig serialization/deserialization roundtrip
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectConfig Clone and Debug derives work
tasks.impl_notes: package_json uses serde_json::Value for flexible JSON handling.

tasks.title: Define ProjectInfo Struct
tasks.description: Replace name: String with name: Option<String>. Replace language: String with project_type: ProjectType. Add package_manager: PackageManager, languages: Vec<String>, is_monorepo: bool, is_worktree: bool, config: ProjectConfig. Remove has_git, has_tests, has_docs. Keep root: PathBuf and vcs_root: Option<PathBuf>.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ProjectInfo::default() produces valid struct
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectInfo serialization includes all new fields
AddRegressionTest: ensure existing code using ProjectInfo.name still compiles (now Option<String>)
AddUnitTest: verify is_monorepo and is_worktree default to false
tasks.impl_notes: This is a breaking change replacing existing ProjectInfo. Update all call sites.

tasks.title: Define ProjectService Struct
tasks.description: Create struct with cache: Arc<Mutex<Option<ProjectInfo>>> and config: Arc<ConfigService>. Implement new(config: Arc<ConfigService>) -> Self. Implement async detect(cwd: Option<&Path>) -> Result<ProjectInfo, ProjectError>. Implement async get() -> Result<ProjectInfo, ProjectError>. Implement invalidate() -> (). Implement async is_worktree(path: &Path) -> bool. Implement async root() -> Result<PathBuf, ProjectError>.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify ProjectService::new() creates instance with empty cache
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectService::get() returns cached value on second call
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectService::invalidate() clears the cache
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectService::is_worktree() returns correct boolean
AddUnitTest: verify ProjectService::root() returns PathBuf
AddRegressionTest: ensure ProjectService is Send + Sync safe
tasks.impl_notes: Use Arc<Mutex<Option<ProjectInfo>>> for thread-safe caching. All async methods must be Send + Sync safe.

tasks.title: Async Detection with Walk-Up Root Finding
tasks.description: Implement walk-up algorithm starting from cwd. Check for .git directory (git root). Check for .git file (git worktree reference). Check for .opencode directory (opencode sandbox). Return root path or cwd as fallback with ProjectType::Unknown.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify walk-up finds .git directory root
AddUnitTest: verify walk-up finds .git file worktree reference
AddUnitTest: verify walk-up finds .opencode directory
AddUnitTest: verify walk-up returns cwd as fallback when no markers found
AddRegressionTest: verify walk-up terminates and does not infinite loop
tasks.impl_notes: Walk up directory tree until root is found or filesystem boundary reached.

tasks.title: Type Detection with Priority
tasks.description: Check Cargo.toml → Rust. Check go.mod → Go. Check pyproject.toml OR requirements.txt OR setup.py → Python. Check package.json → Node. Check pom.xml OR build.gradle → Java. Check CMakeLists.txt OR Makefile OR compile_commands.json → Cpp. Check Gemfile → Ruby. Check composer.json → Php. Check *.csproj OR *.sln → Dotnet. Check Package.swift → Swift. No match → Unknown.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Cargo.toml detection returns Rust
AddUnitTest: verify package.json detection returns Node
AddUnitTest: verify type_priority: Rust before Node when both markers exist
AddUnitTest: verify unknown type when no markers found
AddRegressionTest: verify detection follows exact priority order
tasks.impl_notes: Priority order is critical: Rust > Go > Python > Node > Java > Cpp > Ruby > Php > Dotnet > Swift > Unknown

tasks.title: Package Manager Detection for Node Projects
tasks.description: Check for pnpm-lock.yaml → Pnpm. Check for yarn.lock (without package-lock.json) → Yarn. Check for bun.lockb → Bun. Check for package-lock.json → Npm. Default fallback → Npm.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify pnpm-lock.yaml detection returns Pnpm
AddUnitTest: verify yarn.lock (no package-lock.json) returns Yarn
AddUnitTest: verify bun.lockb detection returns Bun
AddUnitTest: verify package-lock.json detection returns Npm
AddUnitTest: verify Yarn not selected when both yarn.lock and package-lock.json exist
tasks.impl_notes: Check yarn.lock only when package-lock.json does NOT exist.

tasks.title: Sandbox Worktree Detection
tasks.description: Get DATA directory from environment/config. Check if path starts with $DATA/worktree/. Return true if inside sandbox.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify is_worktree returns true for path inside $DATA/worktree/
AddUnitTest: verify is_worktree returns false for path outside $DATA/worktree/
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify is_worktree handles missing DATA env var gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: DATA directory path obtained from config service or environment variable.

tasks.title: Monorepo Detection
tasks.description: Check package.json for "workspaces" field (Node monorepo). Parse Cargo.toml for [workspace] section with members (Rust monorepo). Check for multiple go.mod files in subdirectories (Go monorepo).
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify Node monorepo detection via package.json workspaces
AddUnitTest: verify Rust monorepo detection via [workspace] members
AddUnitTest: verify Go monorepo detection via multiple go.mod files
AddUnitTest: verify non-monorepo returns false for all detection methods
tasks.impl_notes: Monorepo detection should set ProjectInfo.is_monorepo field.

tasks.title: Language Detection via Walkdir
tasks.description: Use walkdir::WalkDir to scan project files. Count source files by extension. Return sorted list of detected languages. Limit depth to avoid node_modules, target, etc.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify walkdir detects .rs files as Rust
AddUnitTest: verify walkdir detects .js and .ts files as JavaScript/TypeScript
AddUnitTest: verify walkdir ignores node_modules and target directories
AddUnitTest: verify returned languages list is sorted alphabetically
AddRegressionTest: verify performance with large directory structures
tasks.impl_notes: Set walkdir depth limit (e.g., 10) and ignore common non-source directories.

tasks.title: Project Name Extraction
tasks.description: Extract name from package.json for Node projects. Extract name from Cargo.toml for Rust projects. Return None if not found.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify name extraction from package.json "name" field
AddUnitTest: verify name extraction from Cargo.toml [package] section
AddUnitTest: verify None returned when no name field exists
AddRegressionTest: verify name extraction handles malformed files gracefully
tasks.impl_notes: Return Option<String> to handle missing names gracefully.

tasks.title: TOML Parsing for Cargo.toml
tasks.description: Use toml crate to parse Cargo.toml. Extract [package] section name. Extract [workspace] section members. Store raw TOML string in ProjectConfig.cargo_toml.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify toml parsing extracts [package] name
AddUnitTest: verify toml parsing extracts [workspace] members
AddUnitTest: verify raw TOML string stored in ProjectConfig.cargo_toml
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for malformed TOML
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify error handling for missing Cargo.toml
tasks.impl_notes: Use toml crate. Store both parsed data and raw string.

tasks.title: Cache Invalidation
tasks.description: Implement invalidate() method. Clear Arc<Mutex<Option<ProjectInfo>>> cache. Ensure thread-safe implementation.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify invalidate() clears cached ProjectInfo
AddUnitTest: verify get() re-detects project after invalidate()
AddRegressionTest: verify concurrent invalidate() and get() calls are safe
tasks.impl_notes: Lock mutex, set Option<ProjectInfo> to None.

tasks.title: Root Shorthand Method
tasks.description: Implement root() async method. Return cached ProjectInfo.root if available. Call get() internally if cache empty. Return ProjectError::NotFound if no project.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify root() returns cached ProjectInfo.root
AddUnitTest: verify root() calls get() when cache empty
AddErrorHandlingTest: verify root() returns NotFound error when no project detected
AddRegressionTest: verify root() does not trigger infinite recursion
tasks.impl_notes: root() is a convenience method that unwraps get().project_info.root

tasks.title: Crate Separation to crates/project/
tasks.description: Consider crate separation to crates/project/. Move all project-related modules to a new crate for better code organization.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify all project module imports work after crate separation
AddRegressionTest: verify no circular dependencies introduced
RunTestSuite: run full test suite after crate separation
tasks.impl_notes: Optional refactoring task. Only proceed if time permits and no P0/P1 tasks are blocked.
